candidate_definition_hints.text: Lightning fast C++/CUDA neural network framework

This is a small, self-contained framework for training and querying neural networks. Most notably, it contains a lightning fast ["fully fused" multi-layer perceptron](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NVlabs/tiny-cuda-nn/master/data/readme/fully-fused-mlp-diagram.png) ([technica…
